parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.project_number,
  p.name AS project_name,
  COALESCE(p.object_street, p.name) AS address,
  p.planned_start,
  p.planned_end,
  json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'phase_number', sp.phase_number,
      'trade', sp.trade,
      'start_date', sp.start_date,
      'end_date', sp.end_date,
      'team_member', COALESCE(tm.name, 'Offen'),
      'estimated_hours', sp.estimated_hours
    ) ORDER BY sp.phase_number
  ) AS phases
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN schedule_phases sp ON sp.project_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.id = sp.assigned_team_member_id
WHERE p.id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').first().json.project_id }}'::uuid
GROUP BY p.id;
UPDATE events SET processed_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').first().json.event_id }}'::uuid;
